channel.title: AAPL — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on AAPL (Apple Inc.) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: John Armitage: EXITED AAPL (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: John Armitage (Egerton Capital) exited AAPL in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (John Armitage)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED AAPL (-50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED AAPL (+16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added AAPL in Q4 2025 · 1.8% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED AAPL (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: David Rolfe: TRIMMED AAPL (-5%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Small 19-year Apple trim.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Rolfe)

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AAPL (-3%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 21.8% of portfolio. Small continued trim. Stabilizing.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)
